# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      setup_command:
        description: 'Command to run during setup phase (e.g., install dependencies)'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No setup command specified"'
        type: string
      build_command:
        description: 'Command to run during build phase'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "No build command specified"'
        type: string
      test_command:
        description: 'Command to run during test phase'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No test command specified"'
        type: string
      post_build_command:
        description: 'Command to run after build and test phases (e.g., packaging, cleanup)'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No post-build command specified"'
        type: string
      runner:
        description: 'Runner environment to use'
        required: false
        default: 'ubuntu-latest'
        type: choice
        options:
          - ubuntu-latest
          - ubuntu-22.04
          - windows-latest
          - macos-latest
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for all commands'
        required: false
        default: '.'
        type: string
      shell:
        description: 'Shell to use for running commands'
        required: false
        default: 'bash'
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
          - python
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version to set up (leave empty to skip)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      python_version:
        description: 'Python version to set up (leave empty to skip)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version to set up (leave empty to skip)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      upload_artifacts:
        description: 'Enable artifact uploading'
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
      artifact_path:
        description: 'Path to artifacts to upload (if artifact uploading is enabled)'
        required: false
        default: './build'
        type: string
      artifact_name:
        description: 'Name for the uploaded artifact'
        required: false
        default: 'build-artifacts'
        type: string

jobs:
  custom-build:
    name: Custom Build
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runner }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: inputs.node_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: inputs.python_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: inputs.java_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Print Build Configuration
        run: |
          echo "========================================="
          echo "       Custom Build Configuration        "
          echo "========================================="
          echo "Runner:             ${{ inputs.runner }}"
          echo "Shell:              ${{ inputs.shell }}"
          echo "Working Directory:  ${{ inputs.working_directory }}"
          echo "Node.js Version:    ${{ inputs.node_version || 'Not configured' }}"
          echo "Python Version:     ${{ inputs.python_version || 'Not configured' }}"
          echo "Java Version:       ${{ inputs.java_version || 'Not configured' }}"
          echo "Upload Artifacts:   ${{ inputs.upload_artifacts }}"
          echo "========================================="

      - name: Setup Phase
        run: ${{ inputs.setup_command }}

      - name: Build Phase
        run: ${{ inputs.build_command }}

      - name: Test Phase
        run: ${{ inputs.test_command }}

      - name: Post-Build Phase
        run: ${{ inputs.post_build_command }}

      - name: Upload Artifacts
        if: inputs.upload_artifacts == true
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ inputs.artifact_path }}
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Build Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "========================================="
          echo "          Build Process Complete          "
          echo "========================================="
          echo "Build finished at $(date)"
          echo "========================================="
